form.formComment: Missed the frame latest (17.05) when seventh over 300m at this track in a Mix 5. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and two minors. Among the main chances.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at Taree Super Track (18.67) in a Grade 5, finishing a 13 length seventh. Has a win and two places from three starts from this draw. Tough line-up and may struggle.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Tightened for room exiting the back straight and contacted the running rail.

form.formComment: Has shown little speed out of the boxes and drifts back in his races. The latest effort was a 18 length seventh over 520m at Q Parklands. Happy to risk this time.

form.formComment: Has failed to fire at the last couple but she has solid credentials over this track and distance. Has ability and worth including.

form.formComment: Won two starts back at this track over 300m when well in the market then went for a spell of a week. Returned last start finished 2nd in a Grade 5 on March 30 over 300m at this track behind Colonel's Ranger beaten 4 lengths (16.63). Capable of a strong show.

form.formComment: Hit the ground running with a slick early sectional but ran over late and missed the frame when a 3.5 lengths fifth (20.07) over 352m at Q Lakeside. Look for improvement. Not out of it.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 5th over 390m at Q Lakeside beaten 6 lengths (22.38) behind Federal Galaxy in a Grade 5 on April 2. Leading chance who should prove hard to beat.
